description: Style Note Being fashionable means being able to combine the right amount of comfort with a bucket load of style in your outfit. Wranger goes colourful and super trendy with this comfortable top. Pair it with your favourite pair of jeans and flip flops and accessorise subtly. Product Details A white top with a summery floral print in orange, pink and brown, a mandarin collar with a split V neckline, pin tucks on the yoke, a half buttoned placket and short sleeves Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm, inside out, using a mild detergent with like colours Do not bleach Do not wring Tumble dry or Flat dry in shade inside out Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
